positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial map featuring glowing constellations and mythological forest creatures (like deer, foxes, and owls) interacting within the pattern. The color palette should be deep sapphire blue, emerald green, burnished gold, and hints of iridescent purple. The style must be highly decorative and elegant, combining Art Nouveau linework with modern geometric tribal tattoo motifs. Use strong silhouettes, clean outlines, and a central, harmonious composition, designed to look impactful on fabric. The overall mood should be magical and whimsical. High detail, vector-like quality, suitable for all-over print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, monochrome, grayscale
